name: Gladiator Fights
short_description: Hold the Line. Command the Fight. Survive the Chaos.
detailed_description:
Hold the Line. Command the Fight. Survive the Chaos.

Ancient horrors have risen from the depths, threatening to destroy what’s left of civilization. As a mercenary commander, your mission is simple: defend the arenas and stop the monstrous hordes — or die trying.

Before each battle, you’ll place your squad. Once combat begins, there’s no turning back. No mid-fight commands. No second chances.
Success depends entirely on how well you plan and position your units.

Enemies come in many forms: melee brutes, ranged attackers, explosive beasts, healers, and even summoners that spawn new threats mid-battle.
Every encounter is a test of wits, not reflexes.

Features:

  • Tactical placement-based combat

  • Unique enemies with varied behaviors

  • No active control during battle — planning is everything

  • Stylish visuals and intense atmosphere

  • Dozens of arenas, each like a deadly puzzle

Can you outthink the darkness — or will your strategy fall apart?
